name: Callum Table Lamp - 30 Inch Height - TBL4073 - Gold - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Callum Table Lamp. Designed with a stunning combination of gold and crystal, this lamp adds a touch of elegance to any room. Its gold frame catches the eye, while the crystal accents create a beautiful play of light. Topped with a white linen shade, the lamp offers a soft, warm glow that blends seamlessly into various decor styles. Whether placed in a living room, bedroom, or office, the Callum Table Lamp brings sophistication and charm. Its timeless design makes it a wonderful choice for those looking to enhance their home with a stylish lighting option. Elevate your decor effortlessly with this exquisite piece that beautifully marries form and function.
